notes: Captured before S6's edits. S1-S5 were already implemented (uncommitted working tree) at the time this story started; the full unit suite was green with no pre-existing failures.

lint.notes: app/package.json declares a 'lint' script ('next lint'), but architecture.md's Boundary Rules explicitly confirm no ESLint config exists anywhere under app/, and no Makefile target wraps it. Recorded as NO_LINT per the story-planner's own established Phase-A baseline convention (see S1-S5 architecture notes) — not a gate this story is required to pass or fix.

typecheck.notes: No dedicated typecheck script or Makefile target exists (tsconfig.json is present but only consumed by next build's internal type-checking step, which is not a standalone discoverable gate). Recorded as NO_TYPECHECK.
